post.content:
Hey LeetCode community,

Are you preparing for technical interviews and looking for a handy resource that covers frequently asked question patterns? Look no further! I've compiled a comprehensive list of LeetCode question patterns along with their corresponding links to help you navigate through the interview preparation process effectively.

Here's the list of frequently asked interview question patterns and their respective links:

▶️ [String](https://leetcode.com/list/ehkbkaxt/)
▶️ [Binary Search](https://leetcode.com/list/e5vjd5xs/)
▶️ [Two Pointers](https://leetcode.com/list/e9snhf4h/)
▶️ [Two Pointers - Fast-Slow](https://leetcode.com/list/e9surc0r/)
▶️ [Sliding Window](https://leetcode.com/list/e5na1hcg/)
▶️ [Heap - Top K Pattern](https://leetcode.com/list/e9sr11es/)
▶️ [Heap - Merge Pattern](https://leetcode.com/list/e9spcwu1/)
▶️ [Heap - Two Heap Pattern](https://leetcode.com/list/e9smnbcm/)
▶️ [Heap - Min Pattern](https://leetcode.com/list/e9sa9dgt/)
▶️ [Tree](https://leetcode.com/list/e5xnbz4r/)
▶️ [Fenwick Tree](https://leetcode.com/list/5vezxjhm/)
▶️ [Graph](https://leetcode.com/list/exk9bfmj/)
▶️ [Bridges & Articulation Point Graph](https://leetcode.com/list/exk9jcpt/)
▶️ [DSU (Disjoint Set Union)](https://leetcode.com/list/exseebe3/)
▶️ [Recursion/Backtracking](https://leetcode.com/list/e9zey1gd/)
▶️ [Classical DP (Dynamic Programming)](https://leetcode.com/list/e5du47b6/)
▶️ [Knapsack DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5du8m2r/)
▶️ [Decision Making DP](https://leetcode.com/list/ehgh83qm/)
▶️ [Distinct Ways DP](https://leetcode.com/list/ehgh7eyt/)
▶️ [Max Min DP](https://leetcode.com/list/ehghd2jv/)
▶️ [Grid DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5ducp4i/)
▶️ [Math-related DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5du6ce3/)
▶️ [DP on Strings](https://leetcode.com/list/ehghusgh/)
▶️ [Graph/Tree DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5dult0g/)
▶️ [Bit Manipulation DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5duqfrh/)
▶️ [Interval DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5dtxk8r/)
▶️ [Merging Interval DP](https://leetcode.com/list/ehghlx1r/)
▶️ [Multi Dimension DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5dubese/)
▶️ [Digit DP](https://leetcode.com/list/e5dufyqj/)

Please note that some questions may be common between different patterns as they can involve multiple concepts or approaches. Exploring these questions within different patterns can provide valuable insights and help solidify your understanding of problem-solving techniques.

Feel free to dive into each pattern and explore the corresponding questions to enhance your problem-solving skills. Practicing different question patterns is a great way to develop a deeper understanding of algorithms and data structures, which are crucial for acing technical interviews.

Good luck with your interview preparation, and I hope this list proves to be a valuable resource for your journey towards success. Happy coding!
Thanks for sharing soumik!.It\'ll be soo useful to me\n
